atis.message: THIS IS EKAH INFO H. AUTOMATIC OBSERVATION. 1920Z EXPECT RADAR VECTORS FOR ILS APPROACH. RUNWAY IN USE 10R. TRANSITION LEVEL 40. 00000KT 9999 NCD 07/03 Q1030 (ONE ZERO THREE ZERO). . . THIS WAS EKAH INFO H. ...ADVS YOU HAVE INFO H
